name: agent-team-readiness-scan
description: Evidence-first repo-level readiness scanner for multi-agent coding teams

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/atr-scan.mjs && node --check ./.claude/skills/agent-team-readiness/scripts/scan.mjs && node --check ./.claude/skills/agent-team-readiness/scripts/calibrate.mjs && node --check ./.claude/skills/agent-team-readiness/scripts/validate-report.mjs && for f in ./.claude/skills/agent-team-readiness/scripts/lib/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
